svg.title: Portrait: ransomware operator vs vibe coder
svg.desc: Portrait format split image. Top panel: calm ransomware operator, one key, one target. Bottom panel: vibe coder surrounded by microVMs, ChromaDB, leaked API key, auth flows, bg daemon, router logs, unknown topology.
svg.text: trust humans for the real work.
Every new component = new attack surface.
Not more doors. A different building.
Calling experts: please help save me from myself.
